hypothesis: Add item_id × store_id × weekday smoothed target encoding: for each (item_id, store_id, wday) triple, compute smoothed mean sales using training data only (smoothing factor 20). This is more granular than the global item×store encoding (exp_0016) and captures day-of-week patterns per SKU-store combination. Unlike the full triple encoding in exp_0013 which hurt performance, this uses a lighter smoothing factor and pairs the encoding with the improved feature set from exp_0012 (best WRMSSE=0.94640). The wday-level encoding should capture Monday vs weekend demand shifts per product-location pair.
